creator: kazakov@gmail.com
text:
I approve the patch.

On Fri, 7 Sep 2007 10:40:15 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of net/nss_ldap,
>
> Please note that PR ports/116175 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/116175
>

> Edwin Groothuis
